install.WARNING: Do NOT use 'pip install nanobot' — the PyPI 'nanobot' package is a DIFFERENT project (robot navigation framework). Always use the curl installer above.
install.note: Python-based agent. After install, run 'nanobot onboard' to initialize config at ~/.nanobot/config.json

cli.description: NanoBot uses cli-oneshot protocol for EchoBird integration. The agent itself runs persistently via 'nanobot gateway'.
cli.role_mechanism: NanoBot uses AGENTS.md (plural) file at ~/.nanobot/workspace/AGENTS.md for system prompt. EchoBird writes role content here; NanoBot auto-detects changes.
cli.output_format: Clean plain text with cat emoji (U+1F408) delimiter. Output is very clean by default (no ANSI codes or log lines when using --no-logs).
cli.note: NanoBot is Python-based (unlike PicoClaw which is Go). Config format uses 'providers' object, NOT 'model_list' array.
